name: Time Bureau
description: Monitoring the timeline. Pruning variances using temporal glass panels.
media_bg_css: background-color: #1a1510; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(234, 88, 12, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(234, 88, 12, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px;
css: body { background-color: #1a1510; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(234, 88, 12, 0.05) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(234, 88, 12, 0.05) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px; background-attachment: fixed; } .card, .panel, .surface { backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(68, 54, 38, 0.5) !important; } .sidebar { backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border-right: 1px solid rgba(68, 54, 38, 0.4) !important; } .header { backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(68, 54, 38, 0.6) !important; } .text-center .w-12.h-12 { position: relative; border: 3px solid #ea580c; border-radius: 50%; background-color: #1a0b05; box-shadow: 0 0 15px #ea580c, inset 0 0 10px #ea580c; overflow: hidden; } .text-center .w-12.h-12::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 10%; left: calc(50% - 1px); width: 2px; height: 40%; background: #ea580c; transform-origin: bottom center; animation: clock-spin 2s linear infinite; } .text-center .w-12.h-12::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 20%; left: calc(50% - 1px); width: 2px; height: 30%; background: #ea580c; transform-origin: bottom center; animation: clock-spin 12s linear infinite; } @keyframes clock-spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
